# uci module
> Unified Configuration Interface: UCI CLI tool, API bindings, and default configuration schemas for OpenWrt packages.
> **Total Context:** ~420 tokens

## Recommended Entry Points

- [map.md](./map.md): Structural map for uci that prioritizes quick orientation and symbol discovery. (~210 tokens, l3-skeleton)
- [bundled-reference.md](./bundled-reference.md): Complete monolithic reference for uci when a larger context window is available. (~497 tokens, l4-monolith)

## Source Documents

- [uci_schema-schema-network-qos.md](./chunked-reference/uci_schema-schema-network-qos.md): Defines the default UCI configuration schema for the OpenWrt qos-scripts traffic-shaping system. (~420 tokens, l2-source)
